package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSliceQueuePopFront() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_slice_queue_pop_front"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag queue-style slice reslicing from the front that can retain backing arrays or shift too much data."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
